caption: A man sits at a desk in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie featuring the words "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall displays the word "HUSTLE" multiple times alongside five yellow stars. A red and white sign behind him reads "BOSS" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a small black object and a container with a red label stating "BOSS TALK ONE" are visible. A logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and mostly still, facing slightly toward the right of the frame with a neutral expression, while his hands rest on the desk in front of him. There are no significant changes in position or action between the frames.
